text.title: vui-conversation-design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the vui-conversation-design methodology end-to-end.

step.name: model-state-machine
step.action: Define states; for each state list allowed intents + transitions + prompts. Include no-match + ambiguous handlers.

step.name: author-voice-scripts
step.action: Write voice script per prompt ≤12 words. Mark distinct from screen_prompt.

step.name: author-screen-prompts
step.action: Write screen prompts (may be longer; visual scan acceptable).

step.name: reprompt-policy
step.action: Set reprompt cap at 3 per state. Tier 1: rephrase. Tier 2: examples. Tier 3: escalate.

step.name: noise-test-plan
step.action: Build test plan with ≥3 noise conditions. Run pre-launch; iterate on failures.
